description: Forged-part cross-section at die corner / flash-line region: lifted upper die w/ press arrow, grain flow lines running out through the flash, parting line. Reveals: tongue of surface metal folding over w/ dark unfused void + contact seam (ffFold), finished lap drawn as smooth shallow curving line w/ rolled surface lips (ffLapLine), shallow-angle indicator (ffAngle), site markers at flash line + corner (ffSpots).
